logs.message: Detected package version outside of dependency constraint: AutoMapper.Extensions.Microsoft.DependencyInjection 12.0.1 requires AutoMapper (= 12.0.1) but version AutoMapper 16.1.1 was resolved.
Package 'Newtonsoft.Json' 11.0.1 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5crp-9r3c-p9vr
